creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Juraj Lutter from comment #8)

Unfortunately, I read your info a few minutes after the commit, but many thanks for your input! I was also able to verify this through several tests, so I have now committed the patch.


(In reply to Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #5)

Thanks for your swift feedback.


(In reply to Fredrik Eriksson from comment #0)

Thanks for the report and the heads-up regarding this issue.

The problem should now be solved, so I will close this bug report.
